data.label: Broadcast SDK for Android
data.description: BytePlus MediaLive 基于先进的音视频处理和大规模内容分发技术，为各行业的企业和个人提供安全、稳定、专业的云端直播服务。凭借丰富的功能和增值服务，BytePlus MediaLive 让你只需几步就能搭建一个流媒体平台。

data.label: Broadcast SDK for Android
data.description: BytePlus MediaLive, built on advanced audio and video processing and large-scale content distribution technologies, offers secure, stable, and professional cloud-based live-streaming services to enterprises and individuals across various industries.With a rich set of features and value-added services, BytePlus MediaLive enables you to build a streaming platform in just a few steps.
